entities.name: PLANT BREEDING RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on improving the genetic makeup of plants to enhance productivity and traits

entities.name: VARIETY RELEASE
entities.description: The process of officially introducing new crop varieties for farmer use

entities.name: SEED SUPPLY
entities.description: The system of providing seeds to farmers to ensure access to new varieties

entities.name: STAPLE FOOD GRAINS
entities.description: Primary cereal crops used as a main food source in the region

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the agricultural research and variety adoption occurred

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: NATIONAL AGGREGATE YIELD DATA
entities.description: Data representing the total yield across the nation used for impact assessment

entities.name: FARM-LEVEL FACTORS
entities.description: Variables at the individual farm level that influence farmers' decision making

entities.name: ADOPTION DECISIONS
entities.description: The process by which farmers decide whether to implement new agricultural technologies or varieties

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AREAS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall where agricultural progress may lag

entities.name: MINI-GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: A localized period of significant agricultural productivity increase through new varieties and methods

entities.name: IMPROVED CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed through breeding to have superior traits compared to traditional ones

entities.name: SOIL MANAGEMENT METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to maintain and improve soil health and productivity

entities.name: MANURE
entities.description: Organic matter used as a soil amendment to improve fertility

entities.name: FERTILIZER
entities.description: Chemical or natural substances added to soil to increase nutrient content
